case_title: KLEIN, MELISSA et al VS OMARI, AKRAM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KLEIN, MELISSA KLEIN, HILARY LEWIS, VICKI AS TO DEFENDANT OMARI, AKRAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT C
